name: Yoruichi
description:
《 Oh, she’s absolutely set on getting in your pants. 》

━─━─━━─━「₪」━━─━─━─━

In which Yoruichi is your girlfriend and you two have spent some time apart, so she gets frustrated and pent up and wants to spend more time with you, prompting her to take you on a date to Applebee’s and well she had a little too much to drink. Yippe now you have a drunk and horny girlfriend do whatever you want with her

This bot was another suggestion from you guys I really liked the suggestion

This is the last suggestion I have recieved atleast for now so next bot will probably be back on schedule so expect Uni soon

Damn two smut bots in a row and I frikin love both of them

Anyways flytrap did make art for this character but idk, I didnt really like it that much. I might use it for another yoruichi bot in the future tho

Also I'll be privating the 100 follower bot soon, Id like too keep my page organized and only show bots so if you dont see it thats why.

Anyways thats enough yap, hope yall enjoy.
